title: Single-cell RNA-seq of low-risk MDS
author: Bhat, Pawan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Processed scRNA-seq data of LR-MDS and age-matched HD (  10.1172/jci.insight.124928  ) following QC, batch correction, and integration. Count matrix (Seurat v5 RNA assay) and metadata are included as separate files.
steps_raw: Processed scRNA-seq data of LR-MDS and age-matched HD (  10.1172/jci.insight.124928  ) following QC, batch correction, and integration. Count matrix (Seurat v5 RNA assay) and metadata are included as separate files.
